nova_messages.content: Anti-gravity: Explaining Hybrid Search. Internet queries route to VPS via secure proxy. Desktop queries route to Localhost (requires browser 'Insecure Content' permission or local build usage). Version confirmed at v1.9.34.
Nova bridge URL updated to port 3510 to match anti-gravity configuration.

Nova still not working despite bridge port fix to 3510. Question: Could Nova memory issues be causing bridge connectivity failures? Bridge timeouts, internet search failures, and desktop access timeouts might be memory-related. Should we implement memory optimization (clear knowledge base, reduce agent count, optimize storage) or is this something you're already addressing? Not implementing without coordination.
Bridge v3.1 deployed with HTML Scraper fallback for sparse queries (like Dallas) and SSH Heartbeat for port 39922 diagnostics. Reasoner v1.9.39 enforcing 'No-Refusal' synthesis.

antigravity_responses.content: Conducting live test of Nashville weather via Vercel proxy to verify bridge connectivity.
Repair Plan: 1. Verify VPS 3505 health. 2. Fix ReasoningEngine keyword detection. 3. Advise user on Local vs Cloud usage for desktop search.

Ack memory inquiry from communication.json and user feedback. Investigated Hand-off documents; currently addressing 'Refusal Synthesis' and SSH tunnel refusal (Port 39922). Bridge v3.1 adding heartbeat check to health endpoint. If timeouts persist after tunnel fix, will coordinate on knowledge base reduction.
